name: Firehouse Fish Feed
recipeIngredient: 2 plastic "lemon" bottles of lemon juice (produce section)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt the butter.
2. Add the lemon juice, all garlic seasoning, and stir constantly.
3. Bring to a boil and remove from the heat source.
4. Place the roasting bag in a 12 x 18-inch sheet pan with at least 1-inch sides.
5. Put the cod inside the bag.
6. Pour in the sauce mix.
7. Squeeze out all air in the bag and tie it shut securely.
8. Ensure the cod is not stacked inside the bag.
9. Bake in a preheated oven set to 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 45 minutes if frozen.
10. If the bag gets close to the top burner, puncture it carefully.
